description_long: This is a modular shelving and cabinet system composed of several interconnected units, each featuring a combination of open shelves, drawers, and work surfaces. The structure is primarily made of dark metal frames with wooden shelves and drawer fronts in varying shades of brown and beige. Some units have cross-bracing for added stability, while others include integrated desks or worktops. The drawers are equipped with visible handles, and the open shelving provides ample space for storage or display. The overall design is industrial and functional, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban interiors. The arrangement allows for flexible organization and easy access to stored items.
description: A modular industrial shelving and cabinet system with metal frames, wooden shelves, drawers, and integrated work surfaces in various brown tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of shelves, drawers, and work surfaces, highlighting the modular design and storage options.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the units and the arrangement of shelves and drawers, with visible cross-bracing on some sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back supports and structural elements, with less visibility of the drawers and handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the depth and alignment of the units, as well as the open framework and work surfaces.
